description: Documentation and public API source for react-native-reanimated-carousel v5.
rules: Use only exports documented by src/index.tsx; v5 does not support compatibility aliases or deep imports.
For v4-to-v5 upgrades, follow example/website/pages/migration-v5.mdx in order and run the codemod before behavioral review.
Treat progress as a logical fractional index and scrollOffsetValue as signed pixel translation.
